2019 Summer Tuition
2018 Summer Tuition

Double: $119 / Week
Large Double: $142 / Week
*** May 2, 2017 Cancel Summer Session 1 housing w/ 300USD Cancellation Fee.
June 14, 2017 Cancel Summer session 2 housing w/ 300USD Cancellation Fee.
$710-$1,951
$710/Double room, $851/Large Double room, $1,277/Single, $1,525/Apartment Large double room, $1,951/Apartment Style single room.
